commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=38265337012c6dbc549e86ee9c9df2d11bf529de)
commands.review_summary:
The branch wraps shared `RetryConfigSchema.jitter` in `z.preprocess` to coerce boolean values to numbers and adds focused schema tests for those cases.

PR surface: Source +8, Tests +33. Total +41 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Current main still defines `RetryConfigSchema.jitter` as number-only and the linked issue provides the exact boolean value and validation error; I did not run a live systemd restart loop in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A focused repair can move the boolean normalization into the existing doctor migration path; the linked issue closure text still needs author or maintainer handling before merge.

target.title: fix(config): coerce boolean retry.jitter to number (#52130)
